problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to they, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
